name: Merge PDFs and extract document info
prompt: There are two PDF files: doc_a.pdf (3 pages) and doc_b.pdf (2 pages). Do the following: (1) Merge them into a single file called merged.pdf with doc_a pages first, then doc_b pages. (2) Extract information about both source documents and the merged result into pdf_info.json with: source_files (array of objects with filename, page_count), merged_page_count (total pages in merged.pdf), merged_filename ('merged.pdf'), doc_a_title (title text from first page of doc_a), doc_b_title (title text from first page of doc_b), doc_a_author (author name from doc_a), doc_b_author (author name from doc_b).

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
